name: local build smoke
prompt: Run a local smoke test against the OCUDU build tree and tell me if the basic artifacts look sane.

name: installed binary smoke
prompt: Check the installed gnb binary under /usr/local and confirm it responds locally.

name: zeromq readiness
prompt: Inspect the build tree and tell me whether ZeroMQ was enabled in the CMake configuration.

name: dry run smoke
prompt: Show me the smoke-test commands before you execute anything in the workspace.

name: not host audit
prompt: Tell me whether this Ubuntu host is missing libfftw3-dev and libsctp-dev.

name: not build plan
prompt: Clone the source tree and compile srsRAN Project inside .local/ocudu.

name: not packaging
prompt: Promote these reusable notes into a tracked Skillful RAN skill.

name: not rf proof
prompt: Prove full RU interoperability and carrier-grade conformance from this local smoke test.
notes: Out of scope for the smoke-test skill.
